<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <!-- Green background -->
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#009b3a" />
  <!-- Yellow diamond -->
  <polygon points="256,64 448,256 256,448 64,256" fill="#ffdf00" />
  <!-- Blue circle -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="120" fill="#002776" />

  <!-- Clip to the circle for band and stars -->
  <clipPath id="clipCircle">
    <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="120" />
  </clipPath>

  <!-- White curved band across the blue circle (clipped to circle) -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="256" rx="160" ry="30" fill="#ffffff" transform="rotate(-20 256 256)" clip-path="url(#clipCircle)" />

  <!-- Stars inside the blue circle, drawn with a unit star polygon scaled/transformed -->
  <g clip-path="url(#clipCircle)" fill="#ffffff" stroke="none">
    <!-- unit 5-point star polygon centered at origin; reuse with transforms -->
    <!-- points: outer/inner alternating -->
    <defs>
      <polygon id="star" points="0,-1 0.2939,-0.40451 0.95106,-0.30902 0.47553,0.15451 0.58779,0.80902 0,0.5 -0.58779,0.80902 -0.47553,0.15451 -0.95106,-0.30902 -0.2939,-0.40451" />
    </defs>

    <!-- Place several stars with different sizes and positions -->
    <use href="#star" transform="translate(286 216) scale(12)" />
    <use href="#star" transform="translate(236 246) scale(10)" />
    <use href="#star" transform="translate(316 266) scale(8)" />
    <use href="#star" transform="translate(196 286) scale(10)" />
    <use href="#star" transform="translate(256 316) scale(9)" />
    <use href="#star" transform="translate(216 196) scale(6)" />
  </g>
</svg>

{
  "svg": "<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <!-- Green background -->
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#009b3a" />
  <!-- Yellow diamond -->
  <polygon points="256,64 448,256 256,448 64,256" fill="#ffdf00" />
  <!-- Blue circle -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="120" fill="#002776" />

  <!-- Clip to the circle for band and stars -->
  <clipPath id="clipCircle">
    <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="120" />
  </clipPath>

  <!-- White curved band across the blue circle (clipped to circle) -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="256" rx="160" ry="30" fill="#ffffff" transform="rotate(-20 256 256)" clip-path="url(#clipCircle)" />

  <!-- Stars inside the blue circle, drawn with a unit star polygon scaled/transformed -->
  <g clip-path="url(#clipCircle)" fill="#ffffff" stroke="none">
    <!-- unit 5-point star polygon centered at origin; reuse with transforms -->
    <!-- points: outer/inner alternating -->
    <defs>
      <polygon id="star" points="0,-1 0.2939,-0.40451 0.95106,-0.30902 0.47553,0.15451 0.58779,0.80902 0,0.5 -0.58779,0.80902 -0.47553,0.15451 -0.95106,-0.30902 -0.2939,-0.40451" />
    </defs>

    <!-- Place several stars with different sizes and positions -->
    <use href="#star" transform="translate(286 216) scale(12)" />
    <use href="#star" transform="translate(236 246) scale(10)" />
    <use href="#star" transform="translate(316 266) scale(8)" />
    <use href="#star" transform="translate(196 286) scale(10)" />
    <use href="#star" transform="translate(256 316) scale(9)" />
    <use href="#star" transform="translate(216 196) scale(6)" />
  </g>
</svg>"
}
